regex.source: Notice("Something went wrong, is Anki open?")
regex.target: Notice("出了点问题，Anki 打开了吗？")

regex.source: Notice("The deck name must be at least 1 character long")
regex.target: Notice("牌组名称必须至少为一个字符长。")

regex.source: Notice("No default tags will be added")
Notice("The tag must be at least 1 character long")
regex.target: Notice("标记的长度必须至少为1个字符")

regex.source: Notice("The separator must be at least 1 character long")
regex.target: Notice("分隔符的长度必须至少为1个字符")

regex.source: Notice("The separator must be different from the inline reverse separator")
regex.target: Notice("分隔符必须与内联反向分隔符不同。")

regex.target: Notice("分隔符必须与行内分隔符不同。")
.error('已达到 10 个跨度的最大嵌套级别！！！')

regex.source: description: 'Tries to smartly fix indentation in es6 strings'
regex.target: description: '尝试巧妙地修复es6字符串中的缩进'

regex.source: description: 'Disables the requirement of indenting nested sublists by 4 spaces'
regex.target: description: '禁用嵌套子列表缩进4个空格的要求'

regex.source:
description: 'Parses simple line breaks as
(GFM Style)'
regex.target:
description: '将简单换行符解析为
（GFM样式）'

regex.source: description: 'Makes adding a space between `#` and the header text mandatory (GFM Style)'
regex.target: description: '强制在“#”和标题文本之间添加空格（GFM样式）”'

regex.source: description: 'Changes the link generated by @mentions. Only applies if ghMentions option is enabled.'
regex.target: description: '更改@mentions生成的链接。仅在启用ghMentions选项时适用。'

regex.source: description: 'Encode e-mail addresses through the use of Character Entities, transforming ASCII e-mail addresses into its equivalent decimal entities'
regex.target: description: '通过使用字符实体对电子邮件地址进行编码，将ASCII电子邮件地址转换为等效的十进制实体'

regex.source: description: 'Open all links in new windows'
regex.target: description: '在新窗口中打开所有链接'

regex.source:
description: 'Support for HTML Tag escaping. ex: \
foo\
'
description: 'Enable emoji support. Ex: `this is a :smile: emoji`'
regex.target: description: '启用表情符号支持。例如：`这是一个：微笑：表情符号`'

regex.source: description: 'Enable support for underline. Syntax is double or triple underscores: `__underline word__`. With this option enabled, underscores no longer parses into `<em>` and `<strong>`'
regex.target: description: '启用下划线支持。语法是双下划线或三下划线：`__underline word__`。启用此选项后，下划线不再解析为“<em>”和“<strong>”`'

regex.source: description: 'Outputs a complete html document, including `<html>`, `<head>` and `<body>` tags'
regex.target: description: '输出一个完整的html文档，包括“<html>”、“<head>”和“<body>”标签'

regex.source: description: 'Enable support for document metadata (defined at the top of the document between `«««` and `»»»` or between `---` and `---`).'
regex.target: description: '启用对文档元数据的支持（定义在文档顶部“«««”和“»»»”之间或“---”和“---”之间）。'

regex.source: .setDesc("Test that connection between Anki and Obsidian actually works.")
regex.target: .setDesc("测试 Anki 和 Obsidian 之间的连接是否确实有效。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Add the ancestor headings to the question of the flashcard.")
regex.target: .setDesc("将祖先标题添加到抽认卡的问题中。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Add to every card the source, i.e. the link to the original card. NOTE: Old cards made without source support cannot be updated.")
regex.target: .setDesc("在每张卡片上添加来源，即原始卡片的链接。注意：没有源代码支持的旧卡无法更新。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Add highlight of the code in Anki.")
.setDesc("Add ID to end of line for inline cards.")
.setDesc("The name of the default deck where the cards will be added when not specified.")
regex.target: .setDesc("未指定时将添加卡片的默认卡片组的名称。")

regex.source: .setDesc("This tag will be added to each generated card on Anki")
regex.target: .setDesc("此标签将添加到Anki上生成的每张卡上")

regex.source: .setDesc("The tag to identify the flashcards in the notes (case-insensitive).")
regex.target: .setDesc("用于识别笔记中抽认卡的标签（不区分大小写）。")

regex.source: .setDesc("The separator to identifty the inline cards in the notes.")
regex.target: .setDesc("笔记中用于识别内嵌卡片的分隔符。")
